mapper.insert: insert into accounts (role, username, phone, password_hash, region_code, avatar_url, status, created_at, updated_at) values (#{role}, #{username}, #{phone}, #{passwordHash}, #{regionCode}, #{avatarUrl}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update accounts set role = #{role}, username = #{username}, phone = #{phone}, password_hash = #{passwordHash}, region_code = #{regionCode}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, role, username, phone, password_hash, region_code, avatar_url, status, created_at, updated_at from accounts
